_source: Manual curation against Odoo source tree addons/web/static/src/scss/ and addons/web/static/lib/bootstrap/
_note: Bootstrap major.minor reflects the version Odoo ships in addons/web/static/lib/bootstrap/. Patch versions are bumped by Odoo across point releases without API impact and are omitted. SCSS file paths are stable entry points used as customization seams.

breaking_changes: Frontend stack predates SCSS variables — Odoo 8 ships plain CSS only.
No standardized brand color overrides; customization requires forking openerp.css.
8.0.notes: Bootstrap 3 LESS source in addons/web/static/lib/bootstrap/less/. CSS is precompiled and shipped as-is.

breaking_changes: Switched build pipeline from plain CSS to LESS (still Bootstrap 3-based).
openerp.css split into multiple per-domain stylesheets.
9.0.notes: First Odoo version with a LESS variable layer that downstream addons can override before recompile.

breaking_changes: Stylesheet asset bundles introduced (web.assets_backend, web.assets_frontend).
Color/spacing variables consolidated into addons/web/static/src/less/variables.less.
10.0.notes: Still Bootstrap 3. Theme customization should target variables.less; do not edit Bootstrap library files directly.

breaking_changes: Major: LESS removed, Bootstrap 4 + SCSS adopted. All custom themes from v10 must be rewritten.
Grid switched from float-based to flexbox; .row/.col-* class behavior differs.
Glyphicons removed — Font Awesome 5 introduced as the icon set.
Many utility class names renamed (e.g. .pull-left → .float-left, .hidden-* → .d-*-none).
11.0.notes: First version on Bootstrap 4 + SCSS. Override brand colors via $o-brand-primary in a custom _variables.scss prepended to the asset bundle.

breaking_changes: Bootstrap minor bump to 4.1 — toast component added, popover/tooltip API refined.
bootstrap_overridden.scss introduced as the canonical seam for Bootstrap variable overrides.
12.0.notes: The recommended customization layer is bootstrap_overridden.scss — override $primary, $body-bg, etc. here rather than in variables.scss.

breaking_changes: Bootstrap 4.3: utility API expanded ($utilities-* maps), some spacer scales adjusted.
.badge-pill class behavior tightened; rounded-pill recommended.
13.0.notes: Last release before website/portal stylesheets were heavily reorganized in v14.

breaking_changes: Website/portal frontend SCSS refactored — website.scss becomes the primary frontend entry.
web_editor stylesheets split into common/backend/frontend bundles.
14.0.notes: Customizing frontend (website) themes requires touching both website.scss and bootstrap_overridden.scss layers.

breaking_changes: Major: Bootstrap 5.1 adopted. jQuery dropped as a Bootstrap dependency — JS components rewritten on vanilla JS.
Internet Explorer support dropped.
RTL is now built-in via Bootstrap 5 logical properties (no separate RTL stylesheet).
Many components renamed: .form-row removed, .custom-select → .form-select, data-toggle → data-bs-toggle.
Variable layering split into primary_variables.scss (brand) and secondary_variables.scss (derived) — overrides must respect this ordering.
15.0.notes: Override $o-brand-primary and $o-brand-odoo in primary_variables.scss. Secondary tokens (e.g. $body-bg) belong in bootstrap_overridden.scss.

breaking_changes: OWL 2 introduced — most legacy Widget-based templates migrated to OWL components. Component-scoped styles increasingly use SCSS modules colocated with .js files.
Backend top-bar / cog-menu restyled — variable names like $o-cog-menu-* renamed.
16.0.notes: Same Bootstrap version as v15 but heavier component restyling. Migration cost from v15 is mostly OWL, not SCSS.

breaking_changes: Bootstrap 5.3 brings native color modes (light/dark) via data-bs-theme — Odoo backend gains a partial dark-mode story.
Many color tokens migrated from SCSS variables to CSS custom properties (--bs-primary, --bs-body-bg, etc.).
Theme overrides via CSS variables now take precedence over SCSS overrides at runtime — be careful when both are set.
17.0.notes: For brand customization: still override $o-brand-primary in primary_variables.scss for build-time defaults. Use --bs-primary CSS variable for runtime/theme-toggle scenarios.

breaking_changes: Bootstrap stack stable at 5.3 — no major SCSS breaking changes vs v17.
Frontend bundle layout refined; some asset bundle names tightened (verify against your custom theme's __manifest__.py assets key).
18.0.notes: Lower-risk upgrade from v17 on the styling layer. Bulk of v18 frontend churn is OWL component-level, not Bootstrap-level.

breaking_changes: Bootstrap 5.3 retained. Dark mode coverage in the backend is broader vs v17/v18 — more components opt into data-bs-theme.
CSS-custom-property-first theming approach increasingly favored over SCSS-variable overrides.
19.0.notes: Theming guidance: prefer runtime CSS custom properties (--bs-*, --o-*) when targeting a multi-theme deployment; reserve SCSS overrides for fixed brand defaults.
